task_completion.description: Navigate to the E-Commerce Platform project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject web interface is visible with 'E-Commerce Platform' selected as the current project in the top navigation or sidebar.
The 'Work packages' or 'Backlogs' module is selected in the left sidebar, displaying a list or board of tasks.

task_completion.description: Filter work packages by Sprint 1 - Launch MVP
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter is actively applied for 'Version' or 'Sprint' matching 'Sprint 1 - Launch MVP'. The filtered list should display required items like 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' and exclude forbidden items like 'Implement product recommendation engine'.

task_completion.description: Initiate CSV export of the filtered list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export menu is open with the 'CSV' option clicked, or a browser download notification/dialog appears for a CSV file originating from OpenProject.

task_completion.description: Save the exported CSV to the required path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager window, or terminal command shows the file being explicitly saved, renamed, or moved to exactly '/home/ga/Documents/sprint1_export.csv'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenProject web interface to perform the export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual OpenProject UI in a web browser, rather than using curl/API scripts in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type out the CSV contents
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file is generated via the application's export feature and downloaded, not manually typed into a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or created via terminal echo commands.
A browser download indicator, save dialog, or file manager showing the downloaded file in the Downloads folder before being moved to the Documents folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 'E-Commerce Platform'. Target Sprint: 'Sprint 1 - Launch MVP'. Expected Output Path: '/home/ga/Documents/sprint1_export.csv'. Required Work Packages (must be in export/filter): 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch', 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. Forbidden Work Packages (must NOT be in export/filter): 'Implement product recommendation engine'.
